data.body: AC3 EVIDENCE (merge change gets CI on the merge tree): built a REAL 2-parent merge change 215 (merge feature/s3-ci2 -> main; first parent 374fadc = main tip, second parent 3e20d44 = feature/s3-ci2 head with 1 unique commit). Change revision = merge commit 2533a353 (confirmed 2 parents via GitHub API). g2p dispatched gerrit-verify (run 28654010839, event=workflow_dispatch); the 'require resolvable rebar ticket' job PASSED (merge commit carried the rebar-ticket trailer) and 3 CI matrix jobs (ubuntu py3.11/3.12, macos py3.12) ran. CI checks out GERRIT_REFSPEC=refs/changes/15/215/1 (= the merge commit 2533a353, the MERGE TREE) via checkout-gerrit-change-action — so CI builds the actual merge tree, not either parent alone. Verified vote landing (monitoring). Note: the running review-bot is still pre-S2 (not redeployed), so its LLM-Review on this merge will 409/fail-closed — orthogonal to AC3 (Verified/CI); the bot redeploy is an S5 prerequisite.
